story.bottomsheet_body: This is the main content area of the bottom sheet.
story.bottomsheet_desc: This is a description for the bottom sheet content.
story.bottomsheet_hint: You can put any content here, and it will scroll if it exceeds the maximum height.
story.contextmenu_disabled: Menu with disabled item. Please right-click.
story.contextmenu_disabled_menu: Context menu is disabled. Right-click does nothing.
story.dialog_controlled_body: Click outside or escape to close, creating a callback to setOpen(false).
story.dialog_controlled_desc: This dialog is controlled by external state.
story.dialog_edit_desc: Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.
story.dialog_uncontrolled_body: You can close me with logic or the close button.
story.dialog_uncontrolled_desc: This dialog manages its own state.
story.drawer_body1: This is the main content area of the drawer.
story.drawer_body2: You can put any React components here.
story.drawer_bottom_body: Often used for mobile menus or settings.
story.drawer_desc: This is a description of the drawer content.
story.drawer_left_desc: Sliding in from the left side.
story.drawer_no_slide_body: The slideIn and slideOut options are set to false, so the drawer only fades in and out along with the overlay.
story.drawer_top_body: Useful for notifications or global search.
story.focustrap_outside_desc: This area is not trapped. You can focus elements here freely when the trap is inactive.
story.focustrap_trapped_desc: Try tabbing through these elements. Focus will not leave this box.
story.hovercard_bio: Product Designer and Creative Director. Obsessed with detail and digital experiences.
story.hovercard_instant_desc: This hover card appears and disappears immediately.
story.popconfirm_delete_desc: Are you sure to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.
story.popconfirm_delete_title: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
story.popover_change_val: Change value to see it resize immediately.
story.popover_set_dim: Set the dimensions for the layer.
story.portal_container_desc: The blue frame below is the 'container' for the Portal.
story.portal_desc_escape: Without Portal, the bottom-right popup would be clipped.
story.portal_desc_overflow: This gray border area has overflow: hidden.
story.portal_memo_note: * Even if you switch to another task on the list, the input content is retained if you re-select it (because the component is not destroyed).
story.portal_memo_placeholder: Confirmed with manager. Fixed on Monday.
story.portal_panel_desc: State changes from each component are notified to the monitoring area on the right via Portal.
story.portal_power_desc: I am displayed independently at the bottom right of the screen, ignoring the `overflow: hidden` of the parent element.
story.portal_select_task: Please select a task from the list.
story.portal_source_desc: The Portal component is placed here.
story.portal_task1_detail: Review the implementation of the new Portal story and perform accessibility checks.
story.portal_task2_detail: Investigate table response issues and optimize by applying memoization.
story.portal_task3_detail: Add specific use cases (Notification Center and Side Panel) to the MDX file.
story.tour_feature_desc: Here is a key feature you should know about.
story.tour_help_desc: Click here to get help anytime.
story.tour_welcome_desc: This is the first step of the tour.
